---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for SpecShot
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe how this feature would be used in practice. What does the workflow look like?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references to similar features in other tools.
